target_flow: Video editing — import, cut, split, add effects, export via keyboard shortcuts
architecture_note: CapCut is a Qt6 QML app with GPU-rendered UI. RawViewWalker finds 147 elements but ALL are unnamed. The class names reveal structure (TitleBarButton, ExportButton, NewTabItem, MainTimeLineToolBarBtn, etc.) but no text labels. Control is primarily through KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS — CapCut has 50+ shortcuts covering every editing operation. The search field (TextField_QMLTYPE) at the media panel is the one text-input element.

pid_resolution.strategy: Multiple CapCut.exe processes. Find the one with MainWindowTitle set. The main window class is 'MainWindow_QMLTYPE_463' — NOT the tooltip window 'LVToolTipWindow_QMLTYPE_1779'.
pid_resolution.warning: The titlebar window (102x17) is NOT the main window. The full-screen window (3440x1392) is.

panel_tabs.description: Left side: 12 NewTabItem buttons (Media, Audio, Text, Stickers, Effects, Transitions, Filters, etc.). Right side: 6 QQuickItem buttons (Video, Audio, Speed, etc.)

media_browser.description: Left panel with VETreeNewMainCellItem/SubCellItem (media folders), search TextField, MaterialIconButtons

video_preview.description: Center-right area: VideoGamePlayView for preview playback

timeline.description: MainMultiTimelineLayout with 20+ MainTimeLineToolBarBtn toolbar buttons and MainTimeLine track area

recommended_workflow.import: Ctrl+I to import, or drag files into media panel
recommended_workflow.basic_edit: Space to play, Left/Right to scrub frames, Ctrl+B to split, Q/W to ripple delete
recommended_workflow.navigation_tip: Use J/K/L for shuttle playback (J=reverse, K=stop, L=forward) — press L multiple times to increase speed
recommended_workflow.timeline_tip: Shift+Z zooms timeline to fit all clips. Ctrl+/- for manual zoom.

coordinate_elements.note: Since all elements are unnamed, these are the key positions based on class names. Positions may vary with window size.

search_field.note: The ONE text input — use for searching media

timeline_toolbar.note: Row of toolbar buttons at top of timeline. All invokable by coordinate.

known_issues: ALL 147 UI elements are unnamed — Qt6 QML does not expose accessibility names by default
Multiple CapCut.exe processes — only one has the main window
GPU-rendered preview and timeline — no element data in those areas
The tooltip window (102x17) appears as the first match — skip it, find the full-size MainWindow
